Bitcoin Price Plunges ~50% from October 2025 Peak Toward $60,000s Amid $1.1B Liquidations | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][4]

Bitcoin has crashed through key support levels to ~$64,000 as of Thursday, marking its largest raw dollar drawdown ever and erasing all 2025 gains, with over $1.1 billion in leveraged long positions liquidated in 24 hours.[2] This extends a slump from its October 6 high of
